question_text: At equilibrium a 1.00 L vessel contains 0.0430 mol of H2, 0.0620 mol of I2, and 0.358 mol of HI. Which is closest to Keq for H2(g) + I2(g) ⇌ 2HI(g)?
What is the equilibrium expression for 2NOCl(g) ⇌ 2NO(g) + Cl2(g)?
Calculate the value of the equilibrium constant for H2(g) + I2(g) ⇌ 2HI(g) at 700 K given [H2]=[I2]=0.326 mol/L and [HI]=2.39 mol/L.
